children.name: Mercury is the smallest planet in the Solar System and the closest to the Sun.
children.characters: Mercury is the smallest planet in the Solar System and the closest to the Sun.

children.name: Venus is the second planet from the Sun and is Earth's closest planetary neighbor.
children.characters: Venus is the second planet from the Sun and is Earth's closest planetary neighbor.

children.name: Earth is an ellipsoid with a circumference of about 40,000 km. It is the densest planet in the Solar System.
children.characters: Earth is an ellipsoid with a circumference of about 40,000 km. It is the densest planet in the Solar System.

children.name: Mars is the fourth planet from the Sun and the second-smallest planet in the Solar System
children.characters: Mars is the fourth planet from the Sun and the second-smallest planet in the Solar System
